features.name: macro_declaration_and_reference
features.description: Code should include a define macro declaration that is referenced as an expression in procedural logic.

features.name: macro_reference_outside_always_block
features.description: Code should include a macro reference used outside of an always block, such as in a continuous assignment or task enable.

features.name: simulation_macro_gating_stop
features.description: Code should include a simulation-only stop statement gated by a macro condition used as an expression.

features.name: simulation_macro_gating_printf
features.description: Code should include a simulation-only display statement gated by a macro condition used as an expression.

features.name: assert_verbose_macro_gate
features.description: Code should include an assertion or diagnostic statement gated by a macro condition used as an expression.
